description_long: This object is a vintage corded telephone featuring a polished wooden base with a classic rotary dial on the front. The upper section is adorned with ornate brass components, including a cradle that supports a separate earpiece and mouthpiece, both connected by a horizontal brass bar. A coiled gray cord extends from the base to the earpiece, emphasizing its traditional design. The rotary dial is circular with finger holes and a metallic center, typical of early 20th-century telephones. The wood grain is visible and rich, contrasting with the shiny, metallic brass elements. The overall appearance is elegant and antique, evoking a sense of historical charm.
description: A vintage corded telephone with a polished wooden base, ornate brass fittings, and a rotary dial, featuring a coiled cord connecting the handset.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, ornate brass cradle, and coiled cord clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the wooden base and the profile of the brass earpiece.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden base and the full length of the coiled cord.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the coiled cord and the side profile of the rotary dial.
